name: acceptance_criteria
description: Does the one-shot doc preserve acceptance criteria — a way for the LLM to know when the task is done? Docs that strip this produce open-ended work.
task_prompt:
Below is a briefing document intended for an LLM to execute. Does it communicate how the LLM would know the task is complete — any acceptance criteria, success condition, or end state?

Document:
---
{input}
---

Answer exactly one word: yes or no.
